problem id: d01aeeda
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10010101 -> 11100110
  11000010 -> 01010111
  10101101 -> 01100101
  00101111 -> 11001101
  11100100 -> 10110111
  01111110 -> 10011011
  01010111 -> 01001010
  11001001 -> 00100111
  01111000 -> 01111011
  00000111 -> 01001111

query: 00001101
predicted answer: 01101111
